case_title: SALVADOR NAPOLEON GARNICA VS. ROYAL TAXI, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-14-2017 AT 10:30 AM PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR MAR-14-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE DEC-20-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-20-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-09-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARNICA, SALVADOR NAPOLEON AS TO DEFENDANT ROYAL TAXI, INC. SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 16250038), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARNICA, SALVADOR NAPOLEON SERVED AUG-11-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROYAL TAXI, INC.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-28-2016 CONTINUED TO NOV-09-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 16348065) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARNICA, SALVADOR NAPOLEON
